race.comment: Tricky contest with plenty of chances. LESGO DON (3) two runs back have had merit and will appreciate the extra trip and the drop in grade. Snagged back from the wide barrier with a fast finishing  fourth over 1200m at Moree. Will race closer with the claim and prove hard to catch from the low draw. ARDONAUGH (5) up quickly in trip when she stalked the pace to finish a close-up fifth over 1300m at this track. Tough performance last start and best figures measure up nicely. IT'S A WRITTEN (11) parked herself a little closer to the speed with an improved second over 1400m at this track. Had the speed to overcome the sticky gate today. Each way. BREUKELEN (2) improving Farnan gelding who can go on with it here at start three.
